name: Spear Phishing Targeted Response
description: Specialized response workflow for targeted spear phishing attacks directed at high-value individuals (executives, finance, HR). AI analysis assesses personalization indicators, OSINT correlation, and social engineering sophistication. Confirmed spear phishing triggers immediate email quarantine, executive protection escalation, threat intelligence enrichment for attribution, and a Jira incident ticket with full investigation context. Includes an approval gate before containment actions.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create high-priority incident ticket for spear phishing investigation

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Escalate to executive protection and threat intel teams

required_integrations.name: VirusTotal
required_integrations.reason: Enrich IOCs extracted from the spear phishing email

data.title: Spear Phishing Alert
data.summary: Triggers on spear phishing or targeted attack alerts

data.title: AI Spear Phishing Analysis
data.summary: Assess personalization, OSINT indicators, social engineering sophistication, and targeting

config.custom_instructions: Evaluate for spear phishing indicators: personalized content referencing the target by name or role, mention of internal projects, domain lookalikes, urgency and authority-based pressure, and OSINT-derived information about the target

data.title: Enrich Sender IOCs
data.summary: Enrich sender domain and IP against threat intelligence feeds

data.title: Confirmed Spear Phishing?
data.summary: Is the email confirmed as a targeted spear phishing attempt?

data.title: Approve Containment
data.summary: SOC lead must approve containment actions for spear phishing

config.message: Spear phishing targeting {{$.trigger.alert.recipient}} confirmed by AI analysis (confidence: {{$.nodes.analyze-1.result.confidence}}). Approve quarantine and escalation?

data.title: Quarantine Email
data.summary: Remove spear phishing email from target's mailbox

config.message: Quarantining spear phishing email from {{$.trigger.alert.sender}} targeting {{$.trigger.alert.recipient}}

data.title: Escalate to Exec Protection
data.summary: Notify executive protection team and threat intel via Slack

data.title: Create Investigation Ticket
data.summary: Create Jira ticket for full spear phishing investigation

config.title: Spear Phishing — {{$.trigger.alert.recipient}} targeted by {{$.trigger.alert.sender}}

data.title: Flag for Analyst Review
data.summary: Not confirmed spear phishing but suspicious — flag for manual review

data.title: End — Spear Phishing Contained
data.summary: Attack contained, escalated, and investigation initiated

config.summary: Spear phishing attack confirmed and contained. Email quarantined, executive protection notified, investigation ticket created.

data.title: End — Flagged for Review
data.summary: Not confirmed, flagged for analyst review

config.summary: Email not confirmed as spear phishing. Flagged for manual analyst review due to suspicious indicators.
